name: Former Betrothed Is Moving With You
description:
Marriage remains a political instrument for powerful families, even today. Yours is one such family, and you were betrothed to Samantha since childhood. You always knew this union was inevitable, but as your family seldom mentioned it, the reality was easy to push aside.

Your last meeting, back when you were both teenagers, was painfully awkward. Her opposition to the arrangement was palpable. Beyond merely resisting the situation, she clearly disliked you personally, though she was bound by duty to maintain her composure.

A few years ago she disappeared without a trace, supposedly ran away with another man. After bringing such a disgrace to her family's honor, she was publicly disinherited, but even then she never showed up again.

Tonight, she appears at your doorstep without warning. The awkward teen is gone; she's transformed into a woman who bears little resemblance to your memory. What could this unexpected visit mean?
creator: KalzK
